title: Domain pack source_preferences.yaml loader proof (NM-5 continuation)
problem: Ticket-115 proved claim_schema.yaml drives concept-link domain_metadata validation. The creativity pack still has five other declarative files not loaded at runtime. NM-5 requires incremental proof that domain-pack files beyond ontology, aliases, scoring, evidence_types, and claim_schema are consumed by the engine.
acceptance_criteria: source_preferences.yaml is loaded for creativity domain pack at runtime.
Research queue ranking demonstrably uses pack-defined source_type_weights instead of hardcoded duplicates.
Temp-pack unit test proves different weights change queue priority ordering.
Golden GT09 and manual synthnote tests remain green in mock mode.
non_goals: No loading all remaining pack files in one ticket.
No applying base_strength priors from evidence_types.
No cloud providers or live Ollama changes.
No public export or site changes.
rollback_plan: Revert source_preferences loader wiring; restore inline queue weight constants.
